languages.text: {n}Женщина стреляет быстро и профессионально, не задумываясь. Благодаря вашей реакции заряд автопистолета прошивает тело медикария левее, чем планировалось — падая на пол, он хватается за голову, и его руки моментально заливает красным.{/n}

{n}The woman shoots quickly and professionally, without hesitation. Thanks to your reaction, the autopistol round penetrates the medicae officer's body more to the left than planned — he falls to the floor, clutching his head, his hands instantly drenched with red.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Женщина стреляет быстро и профессионально, не задумываясь. Благодаря вашей реакции заряд автопистолета прошивает тело медикария левее, чем планировалось — падая на пол, он хватается за голову, и его руки моментально заливает красным.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The woman shoots quickly and professionally, without hesitation. Thanks to your reaction, the autopistol round penetrates the medicae officer's body more to the left than planned — he falls to the floor, clutching his head, his hands instantly drenched with red.{/n}

{n}The woman shoots quickly and professionally, without hesitation. Thanks to your reaction, the laspistol's charge penetrates the medicae officer's body more to the left than planned — he falls to the floor, clutching his head, his hands instantly drenched with red.{/n}

{n}The woman shoots quickly and professionally, without hesitation. Thanks to your reaction, the laspistol's charge penetrates the medicae officer's body more to the left than planned — he falls to the floor, clutching his head, his hands instantly drenched with red.{/n}

{n}The woman shoots quickly and professionally, without hesitation. Thanks to your reaction, the autopistol round penetrates the medicae officer's body more to the left than planned — he falls to the floor, clutching his head, his hands instantly drenched with red.{/n}

languages.text: {n}女は躊躇なく素早く、プロの腕で銃を撃つ。彼女の反応のおかげで、ラピストルの弾は計画より左に、医療官の体の中へ貫通した。彼は床に倒れ、頭を掴み、手は瞬く間に血に染まった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots quickly and professionally, without hesitation. Thanks to your reaction, the laspistol's charge penetrates the medicae officer's body more to the left than planned — he falls to the floor, clutching his head, his hands instantly drenched with red.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 女は躊躇なく素早く、プロの腕で銃を撃つ。彼女の反応のおかげで、ラピストルの弾は計画より左に、医療官の体の中へ貫通した。彼は床に倒れ、頭を掴み、手は瞬く間に血に染まった。

languages.text: {n}Kadın; tereddüt etmeden, hızla ve profesyonelce ateş ediyor. Tepkin sayesinde ototabanca mermisi, sıhhiye subayının vücudunda istenenden daha sola nüfuz ediyor. Adam başını tutarak yere düşüyor, elleri anında kızıla boyanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots quickly and professionally, without hesitation. Thanks to your reaction, the autopistol round penetrates the medicae officer's body more to the left than planned — he falls to the floor, clutching his head, his hands instantly drenched with red.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kadın; tereddüt etmeden, hızla ve profesyonelce ateş ediyor. Tepkin sayesinde ototabanca mermisi, sıhhiye subayının vücudunda istenenden daha sola nüfuz ediyor. Adam başını tutarak yere düşüyor, elleri anında kızıla boyanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La mujer dispara de forma rápida y profesional, sin dudar. Gracias a tu reacción, la bala de la pistola automática atraviesa el cuerpo del oficial de medicae más a la izquierda de lo planeado: cae al suelo aferrándose la cabeza y sus manos se empapan al instante de rojo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots quickly and professionally, without hesitation. Thanks to your reaction, the autopistol round penetrates the medicae officer's body more to the left than planned — he falls to the floor, clutching his head, his hands instantly drenched with red.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La mujer dispara de forma rápida y profesional, sin dudar. Gracias a tu reacción, la bala de la pistola automática atraviesa el cuerpo del oficial de medicae más a la izquierda de lo planeado: cae al suelo aferrándose la cabeza y sus manos se empapan al instante de rojo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}女人迅速开火，手法专业，毫不迟疑。多亏你反应快，子弹射入医务官身体的位置比预想的偏左了一些——他捂着脑袋倒在地板上，双手瞬间被鲜血染红。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots quickly and professionally, without hesitation. Thanks to your reaction, the autopistol round penetrates the medicae officer's body more to the left than planned — he falls to the floor, clutching his head, his hands instantly drenched with red.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}女人迅速开火，手法专业，毫不迟疑。多亏你反应快，子弹射入医务官身体的位置比预想的偏左了一些——他捂着脑袋倒在地板上，双手瞬间被鲜血染红。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La femme réagit au quart de tour et tire avec l'aisance d'une professionnelle, sans la moindre hésitation, mais votre coup a dévié le tir de pistolet-mitrailleur vers la gauche. L'officier de medicae s'effondre en tenant sa tête entre ses mains qui se couvrent immédiatement de sang.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots quickly and professionally, without hesitation. Thanks to your reaction, the autopistol round penetrates the medicae officer's body more to the left than planned — he falls to the floor, clutching his head, his hands instantly drenched with red.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La femme réagit au quart de tour et tire avec l'aisance d'une professionnelle, sans la moindre hésitation, mais votre coup a dévié le tir de pistolet-mitrailleur vers la gauche. L'officier de medicae s'effondre en tenant sa tête entre ses mains qui se couvrent immédiatement de sang.{/n}

languages.text: {n} Die Frau schießt schnell und professionell, ohne zu zögern. Dank deiner Reaktion durchschlägt das Projektil der Maschinenpistole den Körper des Medicae-Offiziers etwas weiter links als geplant – er stürzt zu Boden und greift nach seinem Kopf. Seine Hände sind sofort rot durchtränkt.{/n}
